name: node-lru-cache
title: node-lru-cache
description:
least-recently-used cache object for Node.js
A cache object that deletes the least-recently-used items.
This is the Node.js module.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-lru-cache because least-recently-used cache object for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-lru-cache as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-lru-cache with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-lru-cache --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
